display_text: Bullwhip, Cost: 0: Non-purchasable neutral item that grants 25% movement speed to an ally or slows an enemy by 25% for 4 seconds. Casting has a 0.3-second delay. A powerful utility tool for chasing, escaping, or repositioning in fights. Stats: CD: 11s, Duration: 4s, MS Bonus/Slow: 25%, Delay: 0.3s.
